security_title_empty: 🔐 WebApp Security You haven't set a password yet. Create one to log in to the Mini App. Length: 4–64 characters.
security_title_set: 🔐 WebApp Security Password is set ✅ You can change it or sign out all active sessions.
security_set_ask: ✍️ Enter a new password (4–64 characters). Your message will be deleted automatically.
security_set_success: ✅ Password set. All WebApp sessions cleared — sign in again.
security_change_success: ✅ Password updated. All WebApp sessions cleared.
security_old_password_wrong: ⛔️ Current password is wrong. Try again.
security_password_mismatch: ⚠️ Passwords do not match. Try again.
security_password_too_short: ⚠️ Password is too short. Minimum 4 characters.
security_password_too_long: ⚠️ Password is too long. Maximum 64 characters.
security_already_has_password: Password is already set. Use «Change password».
security_logout_all_confirm: 🚪 Sign out all WebApp sessions? You'll need to log in again on all devices.
security_logout_all_done: All WebApp sessions have been ended.
language_title: 🌐 Language Settings Current language: {named_lang} Choose a language below:
ask_confirm_change: Do you really want to switch language to {target_lang}?
ask_nickname:
👤 Create a unique ID
Your ID will be displayed with the # symbol Example: #Shadow_1 Allowed: • Latin letters A-Z • Digits 0-9 • Underscore _ Restrictions: • Up to 15 characters • No spaces or special chars Examples: #TraderX · #Crypto_7 · #NightWolf ⚠️ This ID cannot be changed for 30 days
nick_invalid_format: ⚠️ Invalid format! Use only English letters and numbers. No spaces. Length 3-15 chars.
nick_taken: ⛔️ Callsign {nickname} is already taken. Try another one.
nick_cooldown_error: ⏳ Error! You changed your nickname recently. Next change available in: {days} days.
nick_change_ask: ✍️ Enter new Nik Allowed: letters, numbers, «_». Length 3-15 chars.
nick_change_confirm: Do you want to change Nik to {nickname}? ⚠️ Next change only after 31 days!
chat_commands_text: 🤖 Available chat commands: /top - top 10 all time /topm - top 10 monthly /topw - top 10 weekly /topd - top 10 daily /bio id - profile statistics /smena - who is on shift /referral - top 10 referrals
admin_web_hint: Open the web admin panel for advanced management:
info_main_text: ℹ️ Information Here will be info about the bot.
no_admin_access: ⛔️ You do not have access to the admin panel.
